headline: Dow Jones Futures Fall, Netflix Dives, SpaceX Scrubs Launch After Latest AI Sell-Off
summary: The Nasdaq tumbled on Sandisk, Micron, other AI stocks, but regional banks and transports rose. SpaceX fell late as a Starship launch was scrubbed.

headline: History of Micron: The story behind the computer memory giant
summary: J.R. Simplot never dealt with small potatoes. This is a man who dropped out of school in the eighth grade and went on to found the Boise, Idaho-based J.R. Simplot Company, one of the world’s largest potato businesses. His wealth soared during World War II when he secured military contracts to ...
